entry.title: Fortnite Building Guide: Beginner to Winner

link.title: Fortnite Building Guide: Beginner to Winner

entry.summary: Master Essential Building Techniques and Strategies to Dominate Every Fight Mastering building in Fortnite is crucial for taking your gameplay to the next level. Whether you’re new to the game or looking to refine your skills, understanding the mechanics and techniques of building will give you a significant advantage in fights. This guide takes you from beginner tips to advanced strategie...

entry.title: Fortnite Celebrates 7th Birthday with Exciting Updates: Ranked Reload and Siphon Trials

link.title: Fortnite Celebrates 7th Birthday with Exciting Updates: Ranked Reload and Siphon Trials

entry.summary: Celebrate Fortnite’s 7th Anniversary with Exciting Competitive Updates, New Ranked Tiers, and the Thrilling Siphon Trials Event. (VIA: Epic Games) Fortnite has officially turned seven! Since its launch in 2017, the game has captivated millions with constant updates, events, and new mechanics. This year’s birthday celebration brings plenty of excitement for players across all levels. The la...

entry.title: RLCS World Championship 2024 Recap
entry.summary: Breaking Down the Epic Battles, Surprising Upsets, and Team BDS’s Path to Victory at Rocket League’s Biggest Stage (VIA: Epic Games) Introduction The Rocket League Championship Series (RLCS) 2024 World Championship has concluded, and what a thrilling ride it was! entry.title: Is Peterbot the Fortnite GOAT? Unpacking His Rise to the Top

link.title: Is Peterbot the Fortnite GOAT? Unpacking His Rise to the Top

entry.summary: How Peterbot’s Consistent 2024 Performances Have Earned Him the Title of Fortnite’s Greatest of All Time (VIA: Epic Games) Introduction The Fortnite competitive scene is full of iconic players like Bugha, Clix, and Mongraal, but 2024 has ushered in a new name that is turning heads — Peterbot. This rising star, alongside his duo partner Pollo, dominated the Fortnite Champion Series (FNCS) ...

entry.title: VYSE: Valorant’s New Sentinel Agent is Even Better Than You Think

link.title: VYSE: Valorant’s New Sentinel Agent is Even Better Than You Think

entry.summary: (VIA: Riot Games) VYSE: Abilities and Ultimate Valorant’s latest Sentinel, VYSE, is causing quite a stir in the community. Many players are underestimating just how powerful she can be, but once you dig into her abilities and potential use cases, it becomes clear that VYSE is set to be a game-changer. Between her versatile flash, unbreakable wall, and the ability to disable enemies’ weapons,...
